queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of having no checking account on the reduction of credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigation into the association between critical credit history or existing credits and decreased likelihood of loan default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical evidence linking a negative checking account balance to decreased credit risk exposure.
